title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The green, foam-flecked waters of Maelstrom Bay stretch out in all directions.  A powerful, swirling current prevents any movement north and west.  To the southwest, a low coral reef rises above the wide, rolling swells.  The white spray from the swells slapping against the reef appears ghostly in the moonlight.

The green, foam-flecked waters of Maelstrom Bay stretch out in all directions.  A powerful, swirling current prevents any movement north and west.  To the southwest, a low coral reef rises above the wide, rolling swells.  The white spray from the swells slapping against the reef sparkles in the sunlight.

wayto.11440: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'southeast' else move 'swim southeast' end; waitrt?
